skill_alerts.title: High Demand: RAG & Vector DBs
skill_alerts.message: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Vector Databases have become peak requirements for AI implementation roles this month. Level up to stay competitive.

skill_alerts.title: Market Shift: Applied AI Infrastructure
skill_alerts.message: The focus has shifted from specialized research to 'Applied AI'—deploying and scaling systems. MLOps is now a mandatory skill for 60% of new AI postings.

skill_alerts.title: New Requirement: Prompt Engineering Mastery
skill_alerts.message: Prompt engineering and fine-tuning expertise are seeing a 15% wage premium in recent April 2026 contracts.

skill_alerts.title: Governance Surge: AI Ethics
skill_alerts.message: Regulatory shifts in early 2026 have spiked demand for AI Ethics and Governance experts by 22% quarter-over-辨.

salary_alerts.title: Oracle Layoffs & Restructuring
salary_alerts.message: Oracle initiated massive global layoffs (30k positions) to pivot capital toward AI infrastructure. This signals a major capital shift in the sector.

salary_alerts.title: AI Engineer Salary Benchmark: $160k-$260k
salary_alerts.message: Real-time market data for April 2026 shows Senior AI Engineers commanding between $160,000 and $260,000+ base salary.

salary_alerts.title: Sector Boom: Generative AI Implementation
salary_alerts.message: Companies are hiring aggressively for 'Implementation' roles that drive ROI, moving away from purely experimental AI labs.

salary_alerts.title: CAIO Roles Trending
salary_alerts.message: The emergence of 'Chief AI Officer' roles across Mid-to-Large enterprises is creating a new strategic career peak for senior AI leaders.
